notfor: Top / Underside alignment — use the sibling commands.
precondition: Active document; reference + mover(s) resolvable; all have BoundingBox.
postcondition: Delegates a (0,0,ΔZ) MoveElement sequence inside the inner command's Transaction.
logictree:
1) Resolver_ReferenceUniqueId + Resolver_MoverUniqueIds[] required OR 2-or-more selection (first = reference).
2) Resolve ids to ElementIds; WireError on any missing.
3) Instantiate ElementAlignmentMatchHeightByCentreCommand with those ids.
4) Delegate Execute; tag tracker with solver context (clash_id, delegated_to).

preprompts: Matching solver pair to vertical centre…
